evidence_summary: The scene must capture the transition from a military procession to a formal political alliance and personal emotional resolution. It requires high-scale coordination for the triumphal entry of Thark vessels and Heliumite citizens, transitioning into intima...

A grand triumphal procession enters Helium. Carter, Tars Tarkas, and Thark leaders are received by Jeddak Tardos Mors. The alliance is formalized, and Carter is embraced by the royal family as a savior.
